title: Blocking expert + advocate sign-off + beneficiary usefulness survey
context: This is the HIGH-risk BLOCKING gate for the patient-facing layer: nothing ships until BOTH a credentialed pediatric oncologist and a patient advocate sign off, recorded by name/credential/date. It also captures the partner's last-mile commitment and runs the beneficiary usefulness survey (O6). Without both sign-offs and a committed partner, no patient-facing deed ships.
objective: Record the blocking oncologist + patient-advocate sign-off (name/credential/date) for the patient-facing explainers and run the partner-committed beneficiary usefulness survey.
acceptanceCriteria: Both a credentialed pediatric oncologist and a patient advocate sign off, each recorded with name/credential/date; nothing ships without both.
A partner is committed to the last-mile handoff and runs the beneficiary usefulness survey (O6).
Any explainer failing review is withheld and returned for revision; no overrides of the blocking gate.
Not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels and vetted sourcing are confirmed present on every shipped artifact.
